description: Configure and simulate a Demand Responsive Transport (DRT) service in the Bologna Pasubio network using the network file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_buslanes.net.xml. Generate a ride-hailing demand scenario with 20 taxis and 50 passenger requests departing between time 0 and 1000, saving the demand to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/drt_demand.rou.xml. Run the simulation until time 3600 using a greedy dispatch algorithm and random circling for idle vehicles, with the configuration saved to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ride_hailing.sumocfg. Calculate the average passenger waiting time from the resulting simulation data and save the single numeric float value to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/avg_wait_time.txt.
